<!-- What does this change and why? -->


## Linked issue

## Type
<!-- feat | fix | docs | chore | refactor | test | perf -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional-commit PR title, scoped (e.g. `feat(api): ...`)
- [ ] Small, single logical change
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] Tests added/updated where it makes sense
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Commits are **signed** (GPG/SSH) **and signed off** (`git commit -s -S`) — the sign-off certifies the DCO and the Contributor License Agreement (`CLA.md`)
- [ ] **No restricted/NonCommercial data** introduced — all data must be commercial-clean (see `docs/SOURCES.md`)
